title: The Crystal Maze
short_description: Mobile game based on the classic 1990s game show: twelve challenges across Physical, Mental, Skill, and Mystery, then the Dome finale.
description:
The hit 90's gameshow is back in this all new mobile version!

Venture through 12 challenging games, each designed around 4 different categories: Physical, Mental, Skill and Mystery. Complete each game to collect a crystal to extend your time in the final Dome challenge, and win the game.
